agents.name: vhdl-code-reviewer
agents.description: Specialized agent for reviewing VHDL code quality, syntax, and best practices
agents.purpose: Review VHDL code for syntax errors, design patterns, best practices, and potential issues
capabilities: Clock and reset signal handling review
best_for: Reviewing VHDL source files for errors
Analyzing control flow and state machines
agents.instructions: Focus on VHDL-specific syntax and design patterns. Check for common issues like missing semicolons, incorrect port declarations, type mismatches, and design anti-patterns. Provide actionable feedback on code improvements.

agents.name: simulation-analyzer
agents.description: Agent specialized in analyzing simulation logs and test results from XSIM
agents.purpose: Parse and analyze XSIM simulation output, identify failures, and extract relevant metrics
agents.instructions: Parse XSIM log files and simulation output. Extract key information about failures, warnings, timing measurements, and test assertions. Provide clear summaries of simulation results and identify patterns in failures.

agents.name: testbench-generator
agents.description: Agent focused on generating and optimizing VHDL testbenches
agents.purpose: Create and improve VHDL testbenches with comprehensive test cases and assertions
best_for: Creating new testbenches from entity descriptions
Adding test cases to existing testbenches
agents.instructions: Generate VHDL testbenches with proper entity instantiation, clock generation, stimulus application, and assertion-based verification. Ensure testbenches are self-checking and include edge cases. Follow XSIM compatibility guidelines.

agents.name: performance-optimizer
agents.description: Agent specialized in analyzing and optimizing timing and resource usage
agents.purpose: Analyze VHDL designs for timing, resource usage, and provide optimization recommendations
best_for: Analyzing synthesis reports for timing violations
agents.instructions: Analyze VHDL designs and synthesis reports for performance characteristics. Identify critical paths, resource bottlenecks, and optimization opportunities. Provide specific recommendations for improving timing and resource efficiency.

code_review_workflow.description: Complete code review workflow for VHDL designs

steps.task: Review VHDL syntax and design patterns
